ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of clinking beer mugs.  The robot will raise both arms, slightly angled outward, to bring the mugs (simulated by the robot's hands) together for a celebratory clink. The movement will be smooth yet expressive, focusing on the key moments of the action.  The arms will start in a relaxed position, rise to the clinking point, briefly hold the clink, and then return to a relaxed position. I will leverage the examples to ensure natural movement and avoid jerky motions.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for a toast
both arms lift outward, mugs raised high
the mugs meet with a satisfying clink
arms lower slightly, celebrating the moment
arms return to rest, the toast concluded
